ksa_text: Knowledge of clinical data management standards and requirements, including Good Clinical Practice (GCP) principles, Electronic Data Capture (eCDC) systems, clinical data coding conventions (MedDRA, WHO Drug Dictionary), and data integrity requirements for regulatory submissions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-003 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.413 composite (highest: NICE at 0.413) and is in_scope for the Master Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Master Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, NICE signal (0.413), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does NICE signal (0.413) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Master Data Manager requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Master Data Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.413 is market-validated for Master Data Manager. Final decision: include.
